title: Running a Retrospective After Failure
description: The meeting after the project failed — how to extract learning without personal damage.
summary_pt_br: Retrospectiva sem culpa: problema neutro, linha do tempo, fatores, duas mudanças específicas, sem apontar.

scenes.subtitle_en: The meeting after the project failed — how to extract learning without personal damage.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Retrospectiva sem culpa: problema neutro, linha do tempo, fatores, duas mudanças específicas, sem apontar.

scenes.text_en: The meeting after the project failed — how to extract learning without personal damage. Focus: running a retrospective after failure. The launch failed, and today we learn why — not who.
scenes.text_pt: Retrospectiva sem culpa: problema neutro, linha do tempo, fatores, duas mudanças específicas, sem apontar. Foco: running a retrospective after failure. O lançamento falhou; hoje aprendemos o por quê, não quem.

scenes.title: Running a Retrospective After Failure
scenes.body_en: Blameless retrospective: PROBLEM statement (neutral). TIMELINE (what happened when). CONTRIBUTING FACTORS (not one cause). CHANGES (two specific). NO finger-pointing.
scenes.body_pt: Retrospectiva sem culpa: problema neutro, linha do tempo, fatores, duas mudanças específicas, sem apontar.

examples.en: The launch failed, and today we learn why — not who.
examples.pt: O lançamento falhou; hoje aprendemos o por quê, não quem.

examples.en: Three contributing factors, not one root cause.
examples.pt: Três fatores, não uma causa raiz.

examples.en: Two specific changes leave this room, and everything else is commentary.
examples.pt: Duas mudanças específicas saem daqui, o resto é comentário.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Running a Retrospective After Failure

exercise.question: Complete: "The ___ failed, and today we learn why — not who."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The launch failed, and today we learn why — not who."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O lançamento falhou; hoje aprendemos o por quê, não quem.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Three contributing factors, not one root cause.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Three contributing factors, not one root cause."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Três fatores, não uma causa raiz.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Running a Retrospective After Failure — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre running a retrospective after failure. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca — post-mortem of the failed launch. Open.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Today we learn why, not who.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Let's stay on factors, not people.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Staged rollouts and a testing gate.
turns.pt_hint: Rollout em fases, gate de teste.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Failures handled well are infrastructure, not shame.

scenes.title: The Monday retrospective
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four retrospective moves. Use at least three post-mortem terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On the Monday after the failed product launch, Joca walked into the retrospective with a plan and no accusations.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Today we learn why this launch failed to hit its adoption target — not who is responsible for the failure.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: The neutral problem statement is clear — we missed our first-week adoption target by approximately sixty-four percent.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Three contributing factors, not one root cause — testing gaps, unclear marketing, and a broken onboarding sequence.

paragraphs.speaker: Product
paragraphs.en: Two specific changes leave this room today — staged rollouts by cohort, and a non-negotiable testing gate before launch.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Failures handled blamelessly, Joca had learned, become infrastructure for the next launch — not shame for this one.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Running a Retrospective After Failure". The meeting after the project failed — how to extract learning without personal damage. The launch failed, and today we learn why — not who. Three contributing factors, not one root cause. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Running a Retrospective After Failure". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Running a Retrospective After Failure".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Running a Retrospective After Failure".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
